Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: I suppose that I need a bit of a break, anyway. At this rate, I'm going to lose my voice long before I reach my tree-phase.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: Every splinter in me wants to tell you to get lost. That time is money. But if even my own people can't respect that...

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: Sprout, if you want some advice, only get into a leadership role if you really want the dough. Otherwise all you do all day is get sucked into useless meetings and manage your own managers.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: Sometimes they're the ones responsible for those meetings. Sometimes it's one of your investors who just had this brilliant idea--

Line.Text: --and then you have to spend the whole day talking them down from it, or else it'd sink your company.

Choices.Text: Boo-hoo, poor you. In the real world, we have to worry about more than just 'annoying meetings'.
You make it sound like you're a loser either way. Someone always has the upper branch on you.
Say what you want, but it's either that, or those managers work you to the bone.
If you can't handle the heat, I'd be willing to take it off your hands...
I'd probably relate if I worked a day of my life.
